rules.name: Extremis-level Threat
rules.effect: Once per battle, in your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Heroes of the Chapter
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.
stratagems.summary: +1 to Hit rolls; +1 to Wound rolls if Below Half-strength

stratagems.name: Terrifying Proficiency
stratagems.timing: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: In your opponent’s next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.
stratagems.summary: Each enemy unit within 6" must take Battle-shock test in opponent's next Command phase; -1 if Below Half-strength. Affected units take no other Battle-shock tests that phase

stratagems.name: Duty and Honour
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.
stratagems.summary: Objective marker stays under your control even without models in range until opponent controls it

stratagems.name: Orbital Teleportarium
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit; return via Deep Strike next turn

stratagems.name: Legendary Fortitude
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.summary: -1 Damage to all incoming attacks

enhancements.name: The Imperium’s Sword
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearers melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

enhancements.name: Fear Made Manifest (Aura)
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle-shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

enhancements.name: Rites of War
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

enhancements.name: Iron Resolve
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit is selected as the target of one or more attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

rules.name: Shield of the Imperium
rules.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** models from your army have the **[HEAVY]** ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, if the attacking model's unit Remained Stationary this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Rigid Discipline
stratagems.timing: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can immediately make a Fall Back move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Fall Back move of up to 6"

stratagems.name: Not One Backwards Step
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army within range of an objective marker.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, double the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit, but it must Remain Stationary this turn.
stratagems.summary: Double OC, but unit must Remain Stationary this turn

stratagems.name: No Threat Too Great
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls vs MONSTER or VEHICLE units until end of phase

stratagems.name: Battle Drill Recall
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If your unit Remained Stationary this turn, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
stratagems.summary: Grant [SUSTAINED HITS 1] to ranged weapons; if Remained Stationary, unmodified hit rolls of 5+ score Critical Hits

stratagems.name: Hail of Vengeance
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.
stratagems.summary: Shoot outside Shooting phase, must target only that enemy unit

enhancements.name: Indomitable Fury
enhancements.effect: GRAVIS model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Fleet Commander
enhancements.effect: CAPTAIN model only. Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one point on the battlefield and place a marker on that point. At the start of your next Shooting phase, place another marker on the battlefield within 12" of the centre of the first marker, then draw a straight line between the centre of each of these markers. Roll one D6 for each unit that line passes over or through: on a 3+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Both markers are then removed.

enhancements.name: Stoic Defender
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability while they are within range of an objective marker you control and, while that unit is Battle-shocked, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit instead of changing it to 0.

enhancements.name: Architect of War
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

rules.name: Rapid Deployment
rules.effect:
Each time an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army disembarks from a Transport (excluding Fly) that made a Normal or Advance move this phase (excluding those that arrived from Strategic Reserves), that disembarked unit can
make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to D3+3" instead if that Transport is a Heavy Transport
(see below).


Adeptus Astartes Transport units from your army (excluding FLY) that have a Wounds characteristic of 14+ have the Heavy Transport keyword.

stratagems.name: Machine Wrath
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after a HEAVY TRANSPORT unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
stratagems.cond: That HEAVY TRANSPORT unit, if you rolled a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.
stratagems.summary: Move before Deadly Demise/disembarkation; move through non-MONSTER/VEHICLE enemies and into Engagement Range with them, but not ending there; auto-pass Desperate Escape

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Rapid Embarkation
stratagems.timing: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly HEAVY TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit is wholly within 6" of that HEAVY TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.
stratagems.summary: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY within 6" of HEAVY TRANSPORT can embark in it

stratagems.name: Ceramite Sledgehammer
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features. In addition, if your unit is a HEAVY TRANSPORT, when making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.
stratagems.summary: Move through terrain; HEAVY TRANSPORT also moves through enemy INFANTRY/CHARACTERS, can enter their Engagement Range but not end there, auto-pass Desperate Escape

stratagems.name: Advanced Deployment
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move this phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn (unless your TRANSPORT has the Assault Ramp ability), but can otherwise act normally.
stratagems.summary: TRANSPORT can Advance then disembark; disembarked units count as moved, can't charge (unless Assault Ramp), otherwise act normally

stratagems.name: Purgation Doctrine
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll (if your unit disembarked from a HEAVY TRANSPORT this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll as well).
stratagems.summary: +1 Hit rolls; +1 Wound rolls if disembarked from HEAVY TRANSPORT this turn

enhancements.name: Liberator
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and the bearer’s unit (or any HEAVY TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

enhancements.name: Tip of the Spear
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. If the bearer starts the battle embarked within a TRANSPORT, that TRANSPORT has the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Shock Deployment
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR or GRAVIS model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Armoured Commander
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that TRANSPORT on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

rules.name: Interlocking Tactics
rules.effect:
^^**Adeptus Astartes Battleline^^** units from your army:

- Are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

- Are eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

Each time an ^^**Adeptus Astartes Battleline^^** unit from your army is selected to attack, after resolving those attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit is auspex scanned. Each time an ^^**Adeptus Astartes^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets an auspex scanned unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Codex Discipline
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that target is auspex scanned, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1; if target is auspex scanned, also re-roll Wound rolls of 1

stratagems.name: Guided Disruption
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army has finished making its attacks.
stratagems.cond: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, if that enemy unit does not have the MONSTER or VEHICLE keywords, until the start of your next turn, it is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.
stratagems.summary: Enemy non-MONSTER/VEHICLE units hit by auspex scan are pinned until next turn: -2 Move, -2 to Charge rolls

stratagems.name: Light of Vengeance
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have that ability while targeting an auspex scanned unit or if the bearer has the BATTLELINE keyword.
stratagems.summary: Grant [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] to unit's weapons vs auspex scanned units or if bearer is BATTLELINE

stratagems.name: Shock Bombardment
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army finished making its attacks.
stratagems.cond: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, until the start of your next turn, it is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: Enemy units hit by auspex scan attacks become suppressed until start of next turn; -1 Hit rolls while suppressed

stratagems.name: Angels Defiant
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Wound rolls when S > T

stratagems.name: Heresy Undone
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit (excluding BATTLELINE units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. If it does, every target of that charge and every target of those attacks must be an auspex scanned unit.
stratagems.summary: Until end of phase, unit can shoot and charge after Advancing/Falling Back; targets must be auspex scanned

enhancements.name: Eye of the Primarch
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer and BATTLELINE models in the bearer’s unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Hero of the Chapter
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, the bearer has the BATTLELINE keyword.

enhancements.name: Blades of Valour
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer and BATTLELINE models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Bombast Omnivox
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer’s unit has the BATTLELINE keyword: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

rules.name: Adaptive Defence
rules.effect:
Each time an ^^**Adeptus Astartes**^^ model from your army makes an attack, if that model’s unit is within a terrain feature, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. 


^^**Adeptus Astartes**^^ units from your army gain the ^^**Entrenched**^^ keyword while all of the following are true: 
- That unit is within a terrain feature.
- That unit was not set up on the battlefield this turn.
- No model in that unit has moved more than 3” this turn.

stratagems.name: Unyielding Might
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in your unit.
stratagems.summary: +1 to Objective Control for models in unit until start of next Command phase

stratagems.name: Priority Strike
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls vs CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Stand to the End
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is an ENTRENCHED unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Destroyed models not yet fought roll D6 (+1 if ENTRENCHED): 4+ stay in play to fight, then removed

stratagems.name: Augmented Targeting
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] abilities. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. If your unit is ENTRENCHED, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities instead.
stratagems.summary: Grant either [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] to ranged weapons; grant both if ENTRENCHED

stratagems.name: Evasive Repositioning
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit is ENTRENCHED, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.
stratagems.summary: Unit moves up to D6"; if ENTRENCHED, re-roll the D6

enhancements.name: Honour Indefatigable
enhancements.effect: GRAVIS model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Castellum Omnivox
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Fall Back move, select one of the following to apply to that unit until the end of the turn: That unit is eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Fell Back.That unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Spy-skull Data Link
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Defensive Mastery
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Close-Range Eradication
rules.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by Adeptus Astartes models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Crucible of Battle
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target within 6", add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: +1 Wound rolls vs closest target within 6"

stratagems.name: Rapid Embarkation
stratagems.timing: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has no models embarked within it, and one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: Your INFANTRY unit can embark within that TRANSPORT.
stratagems.summary: INFANTRY embark in TRANSPORT

stratagems.name: Immolation Protocols
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] to Torrent weapons

stratagems.name: Onslaught of Fire
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 12", add 1 to the Hit roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.summary: +1 to Hit rolls vs closest target within 12"; destroyed models trigger Battle-shock test on their unit

stratagems.name: Burning Vengeance
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: One unit embarked within that TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.
stratagems.summary: Disembark unit from TRANSPORT; shoot only that enemy unit

enhancements.name: Champion of Humanity
enhancements.effect: TACTICUS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to their characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for them (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

enhancements.name: War-tempered Artifice
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Forged in Battle
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn, after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

enhancements.name: Adamantine Mantle
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a Melta or Torrent weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

rules.name: Combat Doctrines
rules.effect:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all ^^**Adeptus Astartes**^^ units from your army. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle.


DEVASTATOR DOCTRINE 
This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.


TACTICAL DOCTRINE
This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.


ASSAULT DOCTRINE
This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Only in Death Does Duty End
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Destroyed models fight before removal if they haven't fought this phase

stratagems.name: Honour the Chapter
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.
stratagems.summary: Grant [LANCE] to unit's melee weapons; +1 AP if under Assault Doctrine

stratagems.name: Adaptive Strategy
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for that unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that doctrine this battle.
stratagems.summary: Select Devastator, Tactical or Assault Doctrine; active for unit until start of next Command phase, overriding army doctrine

stratagems.name: Storm of Fire
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.
stratagems.summary: Ranged weapons gain [IGNORES COVER]; +1 AP if under Devastator Doctrine

stratagems.name: Squad Tactics
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.
stratagems.summary: Normal move up to D6", or 6" if under Tactical Doctrine

stratagems.name: Adaptive Strategy
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for that unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that doctrine this battle.
stratagems.summary: Select Devastator, Tactical or Assault Doctrine; active for unit until start of next Command phase, overriding army doctrine

enhancements.name: Artificer Armour
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: The Honour Vehement
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearers melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Adept of the Codex
enhancements.effect: CAPTAIN model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, instead of selecting a Combat Doctrine to be active for your army, you can select the Tactical Doctrine. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for the bearer’s unit only, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine to be active for your army this battle.

enhancements.name: Fire Discipline
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, while the bearer’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, you can reroll Advance rolls made for that unit.

rules.name: Target Sighted
rules.effect:
Each time a Tank Ace unit from your army (see below) Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit. Each time a Tank Ace unit from your
army shoots in your Shooting phase, if that unit did not Advance this turn, you can re‑roll the Damage roll.


Adeptus Astartes Vehicle units from your army (excluding Fortifications, Drop Pods, Walkers and units that can Fly)
have the Tank Ace keyword. In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to three Tank Ace units from your
army to gain the Character keyword. 


Designer’s Note: This means that the selected units can be given  enhancements, and one of them can be selected as your Warlord.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Target Weak Point
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One TANK ACE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: +1 to AP against MONSTER/VEHICLE units

stratagems.name: Kill Shot
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One TANK ACE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls of 1 vs MONSTER/VEHICLE; re-roll any Wound roll if target below Starting Strength

stratagems.name: Rapid Gunnery
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: Unit can shoot after Fall Back this turn

stratagems.name: Reactive Repositioning
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One TANK ACE unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".
stratagems.summary: Make a Normal move of up to D6"

stratagems.name: Machine Vengeance
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.cond: One TANK ACE unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is visible and an eligible target.
stratagems.summary: Shoot outside Shooting phase at visible enemy that attacked you

enhancements.name: Redoubtable Machine Spirit
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model only. The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save and, at the end of your Command phase, the bearer regains 1 lost wound.

enhancements.name: Gunnery Honours
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model only. Once per phase, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Firestorm Coordinators
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Astartes Tank Ace (Aura)
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model only. In your Shooting phase, while a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

rules.name: Armoured Wrath
rules.effect: Once per phase for each ^^**Adeptus Astartes^^** unit in your army, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit.

stratagems.name: Unbowed Conviction
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).
stratagems.summary: Ignore characteristic/roll modifiers until end of turn (excl. saving throws)

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Mercy Is Weakness
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and when making such an attack, if the attacking model is a VEHICLE, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
stratagems.summary: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] vs units below Starting Strength; VEHICLE attacks gain Critical Hit on 5+

stratagems.name: Vengeful Animus
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
stratagems.cond: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.
stratagems.summary: Deadly Demise auto-inflicts mortal wounds; no roll needed

stratagems.name: Ancient Fury
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, improve your model’s Move, Toughness, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1 and each time your model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: +1 Move, Toughness, Leadership, Objective Control; +1 to Hit rolls until start of next Command phase

stratagems.name: Power of the Machine Spirit
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army that was reduced to Below Half-strength as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.
stratagems.summary: Shoot outside Shooting phase, must target only that enemy unit

enhancements.name: Target Augury Web
enhancements.effect: TECHMARINE model only. In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, weapons equipped by that VEHICLE model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: The Flesh is Weak
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Adept of the Omnissiah
enhancements.effect: TECHMARINE model only. Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Master of Machine War
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that VEHICLE is eligible to shoot even if it Fell Back or Advanced this turn.

rules.name: Psychic Disciplines
rules.effect:
At the start of the battle round, select one of the following Psychic Disciplines. Until the end of the battle round, that Psychic Discipline is active and its effects apply to all ^^**Adeptus Astartes Psyker**^^ units from your army. 


Biomancy Discipline
Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit. 


Divination Discipline
Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.


Pyromancy Discipline
Each time a ranged attack made by a model in this unit targets an enemy unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.


Telekinesis Discipline
Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Strength characteristic of that attack.


Telepathy Discipline

Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Sensory Assault
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that is within 18" of and visible to one PSYKER model in your unit. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it. In addition, if the Telepathy Discipline is active for your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.
stratagems.summary: Select enemy unit within 18" of PSYKER: -2 Move, -2 Charge rolls until start of next turn; if Telepathy active, take Battle-shock test with -1

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Fiery Shield
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 18" of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER models, and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll, and if the Pyromancy Discipline is active for your army, weapons that target your unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Hit rolls on incoming attacks; if Pyromancy active, incoming attacks gain [HAZARDOUS]

stratagems.name: Iron Arm
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 18" of one or more ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER models from your army and has not been selected to Fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit, or add 2 if the Biomancy Discipline is active for your army.
stratagems.summary: +1 to Strength of melee weapons (+2 if Biomancy Discipline active)

stratagems.name: Assail
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER unit from your army that is eligible to shoot.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to one or more PSYKER models in your unit (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability), and roll six D6, adding 1 to each result if the Telekinesis Discipline is active for your army: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
stratagems.summary: Roll 6D6 (+1 each if Telekinesis active); enemy unit suffers 1 MW per 4+

stratagems.name: Prescient Precision
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability, and the [IGNORES COVER] ability as well if the Divination Discipline is active for your army.
stratagems.summary: [LETHAL HITS] on attacks; add [IGNORES COVER] if Divination Discipline active

enhancements.name: Prescience
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only (excluding TERMINATOR models). Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if the Divination Discipline is active for your army.

enhancements.name: Celerity
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced, and if the Biomancy Discipline is active for your army, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Obfuscation
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit, and if the Telepathy Discipline is active for your army, the bearer’s unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Fusillade
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] abilities, and: The [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability if the Pyromancy Discipline is active for your army.Add 6" to the Range characteristic of those weapons if the Telekinesis Discipline is active for your army.

rules.name: Rapid-drop Deployment
rules.effect:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select a number of ^^**Adeptus Astartes^^** units (excluding ^^**Titanic^^** units) from your army based on the battle size, as shown below. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

Incursion - 2 Units
Strike Force - 3 Units
Onslaught - 4 Units

Each time an ^^**Adeptus Astartes^^** model from your army makes an attack, if it was set up on the battlefield this turn, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If it disembarked from a Drop Pod this turn, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Suppression Strafing
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to and within 18" of your unit. That enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: Enemy unit within 18" takes Battle-shock test (-1); if failed, -1 to Hit rolls until start of your next turn

stratagems.name: Tactical Decapitation
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: Grant [PRECISION] to unit's weapons; +1 Hit rolls vs CHARACTER units

stratagems.name: Shock Onslaught
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".
stratagems.summary: Pile-in and Consolidation moves up to 6" instead of 3"

stratagems.name: Auto‑sense Coordination
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have this ability in a turn in which they disembarked from a DROP POD or while targeting an enemy unit within 12".
stratagems.summary: Grant [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] to unit's weapons after DROP POD disembark or vs targets within 12"

stratagems.name: Blind Screen
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES SMOKE VEHICLE or DROP POD unit within 9" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your units have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets one of your units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.
stratagems.summary: Models gain Stealth; grant Benefit of Cover against ranged attacks

stratagems.name: Onward for the Emperor
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was not set up on the battlefield this turn and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.
stratagems.summary: ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit within 6" of TRANSPORT can embark

enhancements.name: Laurels of Thunder
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield.

enhancements.name: Veteran of the Vanguard
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Orbital Uplink Reliquary
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Dedicated Gunship
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Lightning Assault
rules.effect: ^^**Adeptus Astartes**^^ units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Blitzing Fusillade
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.
stratagems.summary: Grant [ASSAULT] to ranged weapons; if already [ASSAULT], add [SUSTAINED HITS 1]

stratagems.name: Full Throttle
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit (excluding WALKERS) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is MOUNTED.
stratagems.summary: Advancing unit adds 6" (9" if MOUNTED) to Move instead of rolling

stratagems.name: Shock Assault
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Charge rolls; grant [LANCE] to melee weapons until end of turn

stratagems.name: Ride Hard, Ride Fast
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Hit rolls and Wound rolls on all incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Wind-swift Evasion
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to 6"

enhancements.name: Fury of the Storm
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearers melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Portents of Wisdom
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Feinting Withdrawal
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Hunter’s Instincts
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED model only. If the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

rules.name: Shadow Masters
rules.effect: Each time a ranged attack targets an ^^**Adeptus Astartes**^^ unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll and the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

stratagems.name: A Deadly Prize
stratagems.timing: Start of the Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is said to be Sabotaged, and remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Sabotaged and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: Sabotage objective: stays under your control without models in range; enemy units ending moves in range suffer D3 mortal wounds on 2+

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: -1 AP on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Surgical Strikes
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [PRECISION] to unit's melee weapons

stratagems.name: Strike From the Shadows
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.summary: +1 BS and AP on ranged attacks vs targets 12"+ away; destroyed models trigger Battle-shock test

stratagems.name: Calculated Feint
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a PHOBOS or SCOUT SQUAD unit.
stratagems.summary: Move up to D6" (or 6" if PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD)

stratagems.name: Guerrilla Tactics
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: Up to two PHOBOS and/or SCOUT SQUAD units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.summary: Remove units from battlefield; place into Strategic Reserves

stratagems.name: A Deadly Prize
stratagems.timing: Start of the Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is said to be Sabotaged, and remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Sabotaged and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: Sabotage objective: stays under your control without models in range; enemy units ending moves in range suffer D3 mortal wounds on 2+

enhancements.name: The Blade Driven Deep
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Ghostweave Cloak
enhancements.effect: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

enhancements.name: Execute and Redeploy
enhancements.effect: PHOBOS model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge. This cannot allow the bearer’s unit to move more than once in your Shooting phase.

enhancements.name: Shadow War Veteran
enhancements.effect: PHOBOS model only. Gain following ability: Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
